Q9 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Arrange the processes in the decreasing order of specific cutting energy requirement
Electrochemical Machining (ECM)
Laser Beam Machining (LBM)
Electron Beam Machining (EBM)
Electrix Discharge Machining (EDM)
Ultrasonic Machining (USM)

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)
Order of specific cutting energy requirement
LBM > EBM > USM > EDM > ECM

Q10 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

In a sand mould, a sprue of 220 mm height and 115 mm2 top area is provided to maintain the flow rate of liquid at 28900 mm3/sec. Considering acceleration due to gravity as 9.81 m/s2, the area at the base of down sprue to prevent aspiration of molten metal is _____ mm2. (Answer in integer) (Correct upto two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 13.81 (13.50 - 14.10)
Solution

13.81 (13.50 - 14.10)

Q11 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A gas tungsten arc welding operation is performed on steel using a current of 230 A and a potential difference of 22V at a welding speed of 6 mm/s. The cross-sectional area of the joint is 25 mm2 and the specific energy of melting of steel is 10 J/mm3. If the heat transfer efficiency of welding is 85%, then the melting efficiency is ________ %. (Round off to two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 34.88 (34.20 - 35.60)
Solution

34.88 (34.20 - 35.60)

NAT
Correct answer: 0.207 (0.203 - 0.211)
Solution

0.207 (0.203 - 0.211)

NAT
Correct answer: 8.53 (8.51 - 8.55)
Solution

8.53 (8.51 - 8.55)

Q16 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Which of the following statement(s) is/are TRUE regarding using DC power source in arc welding instead of AC power source?

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(a, d)
For DC power source as compared to AC power source.
• Chances of “magnetic arc blow” is higher.
• Electric energy consumption per kg of metal deposited is higher.
• The equipment is heavier in weight, larger in size and operation and maintenance is difficult because of moving parts.

Solution

Solution

NAT
Correct answer: 711 (706 - 716)
Solution

(a, b)

Q33 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

Which of the following statement(s) about additive manufacturing is/are INCORRECT?

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)
• Additive manufacturing is particularly suitable for creating parts with internal structures or hollow geometrices, which can be challenging for traditional manufacturing methods. Option (a), (c) and (d) are CORRECT statement and only option (b) is INCORRECT statement. Hence,
option (b) is the correct answer.
